---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

A guided walkthrough of Établi Plume v0.1.0, illustrated with real screenshots of the build running on an Android device. Plume is an offline reference and snippet picker for typesetting commands: search a command, see the rendered symbol, copy it, and star the ones you reach for often. No accounts, no network.

## Dictionary

The app opens on the **Dictionary** — every command alongside its rendered glyph, searchable from the top bar. The breadcrumb shows how many entries match (for example, `123 of 123`). Each card carries a command (`\alpha`), its name, the rendered symbol (α), its category, and a star to favourite it. Type in **search commands…** to filter the list live.

![The Dictionary: every command with its rendered symbol.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-dictionary.png){width=320}

## Category filter

The chips below the search box filter by category — **all · greek letters · math operators · math relations · …** — so you can browse one family at a time. Here the list is narrowed to the **greek letters**, leaving only `\alpha`, `\beta`, `\gamma` and their kin on screen.

![The Dictionary filtered to the greek-letters category.](../_screens/0.1.0/02-filter-greek.png){width=320}

## Favorites

Star the commands you use most and they collect under **Favorites** for one-tap access. This view stays short and personal — the handful of commands you actually reach for, without scrolling the full dictionary.

![Favorites: your starred commands in one place.](../_screens/0.1.0/03-favorites.png){width=320}

## Cheatsheet

**Cheatsheet** is a dense, scannable overview of the whole command set, grouped by category — the printed-reference view. It trades the per-card detail of the Dictionary for breadth, so you can take in many commands at a glance.

![Cheatsheet: the whole command set, grouped by category.](../_screens/0.1.0/04-cheatsheet.png){width=320}

## About

**About** covers the app, its scope, and the note that Plume is unaffiliated with TeX or the LaTeX Project. Plume is the deliberate rename of the former EtabliTeX; the names TeX/LaTeX are governed by Knuth's TeX License and the LPPL.

![About: scope and the unaffiliated-with-TeX note.](../_screens/0.1.0/05-about.png){width=320}

## Where to get it

Établi Plume v0.1.0 is an **Android-only development build**, distributed as a signed APK from GitHub Releases:

- [Download v0.1.0 (signed APK)](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-plume/releases/tag/v0.1.0)

App Store, Google Play and F-Droid releases are planned but not yet available. Source code lives at [`etabli-dev/etabli-plume`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-plume).
